messages.content:
please reply to this email as the reply from the HR and i want to mention that hiba not her job to give and comment to dalal should report that to her manager or to HR Dear Hazem and Nour, 

I am writing to you to officially complain about Dalal - Cleaner in Amman office, I was talking to her to ask her about an issue happened 2 days ago in the CBO in Amman, after I received a feedback from Rania and Diaa, they reported to me that the HEad of the CBO was talking in disrespectful way to her because she was collecting the leftovers of food, during the initiative, where the head of the CBO was asking her not to collect the food, to follow up on thaat case, I called yesterday the head of the CBO, who So I called Dalal today to ask her about what happened, and I was telling her that what was done by the head of the CBO was not acceptable, as well what we have done was not acceptable as well, she was criticizing me in disrespectful way, while I was asking her to leave the office. to end the discussion 

This is not the first time for Dala to speak in disrespectful way, and to lie in a way put us in a confusing situation internally and externally. 

I will never accept this attitude to be used with me. 

thanks 

Hiba

Dear Hiba,

Thank you for bringing this issue to our attention. We take such matters very seriously and will address it promptly. It is important to maintain a respectful and professional working environment for all employees. 

Regarding the incident involving the Head of the CBO and Dalal, it is not within Hiba's job responsibilities to give comments or feedback to Dalal directly. If any employee faces disrespectful behavior from their superiors, they should report it immediately to their manager or the HR department. We encourage all employees to follow the proper channels of communication so that appropriate actions can be taken to address and resolve such issues. 

We apologize for any inconvenience caused, and please be assured that we will investigate the matter thoroughly. Our HR team will handle the situation accordingly and take appropriate measures to prevent any recurrence. 

Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any further concerns or questions. 

Best regards,

HR Department
could you please write the above email in different way and short and professional

Dear Hazem and Nour,

Thank you for informing us about the recent incident involving Dalal, the Cleaner in our Amman office. We take complaints of this nature seriously and will address the issue promptly.

It has come to our attention that Dalal was subjected to disrespectful behavior by the Head of the CBO during a recent initiative. We have spoken to Dalal regarding the incident and expressed our concern about both the behavior of the Head of the CBO and Dalal's own reaction. We believe it is essential to maintain a respectful and professional environment for all employees.

Regarding your comment about Hiba, it is not her responsibility to provide feedback to Dalal. If any employee experiences disrespectful behavior, they should report it directly to their manager or the HR department. We encourage all employees to follow the appropriate communication channels to ensure that such matters are properly addressed.

Please be assured that we will thoroughly investigate this matter and take the necessary actions to prevent any recurrence. We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

If you have any further concerns or questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to us.

Kind regards,

HR Department

If any employee faces disrespectful behavior from their superiors, they should report it immediately to their manager or the HR department. We encourage all employees to follow the proper channels of communication so that appropriate actions can be taken to address and resolve such issues.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused, and please be assured that we will investigate the matter thoroughly. Our HR team will handle the situation accordingly and take appropriate measures to prevent any recurrence.

Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any further concerns or questions.

Best regards,

HR Department

Dear Hiba,

Thank you for alerting us to this matter. We take it seriously and will address it promptly. We are committed to maintaining a respectful and professional workplace for everyone.

Regarding the incident involving the Head of the CBO and Dalal, it is not Hiba's role to provide feedback or comments directly to Dalal. Employees facing disrespectful behavior from superiors should report it to their manager or HR. We encourage everyone to use the proper channels of communication to address and resolve such issues.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and assure you that we will thoroughly investigate the matter. Our HR team will take appropriate action to prevent any recurrence.

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have further concerns or questions.

i want to add to the above email that regarding what happened with dalal please note that its not your job to provide her a comment or talk to her regarding what happened u should report this to her direct manager or to HR

Dear Hiba,

Thank you for alerting us to this matter. We take it seriously and will address it promptly. We are committed to maintaining a respectful and professional workplace for everyone.

Regarding the incident involving the Head of the CBO and Dalal, please note that it is not your responsibility to provide comments or communicate directly with her regarding what happened. Instead, we kindly request that you report this incident to her direct manager or to the HR department. This will ensure that appropriate actions are taken and the matter is addressed properly.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and assure you that we will thoroughly investigate the matter. Our HR team will take appropriate action to prevent any recurrence.

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have further concerns or questions.

Best regards,

HR Department

I appreciate your cooperation and patience in this matter. Should there be any updates or developments, I will keep you informed.

Thank you once again.

Best regards,

ما معنى باللغه الانجليزية مسكن الالم

باللغة الإنجليزية، تُترجم عبارة "مسكن الألم" إلى "Painkiller" أو "Analgesic" وتشير إلى أي نوع من الأدوية أو المركبات التي تساعد على تخفيف أو تخليص الشخص من الألم. ويتوفر مسكن الألم عادةً على شكل أقراص، كبسولات أو سوائل، وتختلف قوتها وطريقة عملها اعتمادًا على المكونات الفعّالة واحتياجات الشخص المعاني من آلام.
ماذا يعني انحراف في النظر باللغه الانجليزية

باللغة الإنجليزية، يُعرف انحراف النظر بأنه "Strabismus" ويُطلق عليه أيضًا اسم "Squint". يشير هذا المصطلح إلى اختلال في توجيه العينين، حيث لا تتنغّما بشكل صحيح على نفس الهدف بصريٍ. يعتبر الانحراف في النظر حالة طبية قد يكون لها تأثير على رؤية الشخص ويعتاشبه عادةً بالعين الكسولة أو العين المائلة. قد يُحتاج في بعض الأحيان لعلاج بواسطة نظارات خاصة، تمارين للعين أو عملية جراحية لتصحيح الانحراف.

please write this Dears ,

I have completed the evaluation of the candidates for the CM position. Please see the final scores below

#	Candidate Name 	Interview Score 
1	Hamzeh Al Fawares	36
2	Hadeel Shraim	34
3	Areeg Hammad	29
4	Muath Qudah	25
5	Thuraya Shehadeh	19

Based on the scores and the panel’s recommendation, we have selected Hamzeh Al Fawares so will contact hamzah for reference check once I received the positive references then the estimated time to start working with us is next Sunday 24, of Sep as he is available and he can start any time

Dear all,

I have completed the evaluation process for the candidates who interviewed for the CM position. Please find below the final scores:

#   Candidate Name      Interview Score
1   Hamzeh Al Fawares   36
2   Hadeel Shraim      34
3   Areeg Hammad        29
4   Muath Qudah         25
5   Thuraya Shehadeh    19

Based on the scores and the recommendation from the panel, we have selected Hamzeh Al Fawares for the position. I will now proceed with the reference check for Hamzeh. Once the positive references are received, he is expected to start working with us on Sunday, September 24. Hamzeh has confirmed his availability to start at any time.

Thank you all for your contributions to the selection process.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
